title: Doki Doki NIKKE: Cinderella costume poll
description: Global vote for the new Cinderella costume design, tied to the Global Popularity Poll IV winner. The winning costume is planned to be created and distributed to all Commanders for free later.
rewardSummary: Up to 2 Recruit Vouchers for participation; the winning Cinderella costume will be distributed later.
requirements: Vote for a costume design; social repost grants the second voucher.
verificationNote: Official event page confirms the June 17-24, 2026 schedule and voucher rewards. Start time is kept from the existing project record.

title: Season 14 Campfire Chat and Twitch Drop
description: Developer livestream for Diablo IV Season 14, Season of Death Awakening, with a limited Twitch Drop cosmetic during the stream window.
rewards: Falx Infectus sword cosmetic Twitch Drop
rewardSummary: Watch eligible Diablo IV streams during the update livestream to earn the Falx Infectus sword cosmetic.
requirements: Watch for 30 minutes during the livestream window.
verificationNote: GamesRadar reports Blizzard's announced livestream time and Twitch Drop reward. End time is approximate because the article confirms the start time and 30-minute watch requirement, not a precise stream duration.

title: Version 1.1 maintenance compensation
description: Maintenance window for Arknights: Endfield Version 1.1, with compensation for accounts created before the update.
requirements: Account created before the Version 1.1 update.
verificationNote: The source gives the maintenance window and compensation amount for Version 1.1. This is archived content, kept because completed records must not be deleted when relevant.

title: Turbulent Timeways
description: Limited Timewalking event featuring Dragonflight dungeons and an updated reward set.
rewardSummary: Dragonflight Timewalking dungeons with an updated reward set.
verificationNote: Kept from the existing project data. Search did not surface a stronger dated public source during this pass, so the record remains single-source.

title: Coordinated Operation — Modernia
rewardSummary: Самоцветы и материалы через обмен Broken Cores.
